title: Key System Integration
note: Initial implementation of the Retraktor license key system using KeyAuth with HMAC-SHA256 signing and HWID verification.

changes.text: Glassmorphic authentication overlay (keysystem) rendered on top of the executor UI on launch

title: Script Hub & Multi-Tab Editor
note: Major feature release adding the Script Hub page and a multi-tab code editor experience.

changes.text: Script Hub page with search bar, category filters, and script cards
Multi-tab script editor with open, close, and switch support
Luau syntax highlighting and autocomplete via Monaco Editor
Console output panel with minimize toggle and auto-expand on new log entries
Ctrl+Enter keyboard shortcut to execute the current script
